scripts.dev: concurrently -n astro,bettervars,studio -c blue,magenta,green "astro dev" "node scripts/watch-bettervars.mjs" "node scripts/bettervars-server.mjs"
scripts.style-guide: concurrently -n astro,bettervars,studio,opener -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "astro dev" "node scripts/watch-bettervars.mjs" "node scripts/bettervars-server.mjs" "node scripts/open-style-guide.mjs"
